# Fakhar Auto Workshop

> Professional auto repair in Islamabad, Pakistan.

- Website: https://fakharautoworkshop.com/
- Phone: +92 335 1908270
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923351908270
- Address: Major Rd, F-11/4, Islamabad, 44000, Pakistan
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

## Services

- Electrical repairs
- Mechanical services
- Denting
- Painting
- AC repair
- Other maintenance (oil changes, brakes, tires)
